resources.string: Xác nhận thông tin kích hoạt với máy chủ...
Nhấn vào cả 2 bên của viên pin để chắc chắn rằng nó đã được gắn chắc trong lúc dùng. Lưu ý là vệt màu cam ở trên công tắc pin I và II sẽ không thể nhìn thấy, và pin đã được lắp hoàn toàn vào camera.
Nhấn vào biểu tượng ở phía dưới bên trái để chọn chế độ chụp.
Khi không códufng vỏ chống nước, Osmo Action có thể được sử dụng dưới nước ở độ sâu lên tới 11 m.
Nhấn đúp cùng lúc bằng hai ngón tay để chuyển đổi giữa màn hình trước và màn hình cảm ứng.
Lens và khu vực thông gió có thể nóng lên trong quá trình sử dụng. Để tránh bỏng, KHÔNG chạm vào.
Đảm bảo rằng nắp port được đóng lại, và nắp lens filter được siết chặt trong quá trình sử dụng.
"Chụp ảnh hoặc bắt đầu/dừng quay video SnapShot (khả dụng khi thiết bị tắt nguồn)"
Vuốt màn hình cảm ứng để truy cập thêm tính năng.
"Đảm bảo rằng nắp USB-C được đóng, nắp bộ lọc ống kính được vặn chặt đúng cách và Ghim được lắp đúng cách trong quá trình sử dụng. Độ sâu sử dụng tối đa dưới nước là 11 m."
"Lắp thẻ nhớ microSD trước khi chụp. Bạn nên sử dụng Thẻ nhớ microSD (không đi kèm) có dung lượng tối đa 256 GB và xếp hạng UHS Speed ​​Cấp 3."
"Chuyển đổi màn hình hoặc chế độ chụp khi ở chế độ xem camera và đang không ghi hình Quay lại chế độ xem camera khi ở Cài đặt hoặc Phát lại"
Vào Phát lại hoặc chuyển đổi màn hình khi đang quay
"Bật nguồn thiết bị Khi bật nguồn thiết bị, hãy bật/tắt màn hình"
Sử dụng Osmo để thực hiện các thao tác sau
*Video sẽ dừng và bắt đầu quay lại nếu bạn đổi màn hình trong khi quay.
Điện thoại di động này chỉ hỗ trợ tần số Wi-Fi 2,4 G. Đặt tần số Wi-Fi thành 2,4 G trên Osmo Action. Nếu không, Osmo Action sẽ không thể kết nối với APP Mimo.
Vuốt màn hình cảm ứng để truy cập thêm nhiều tính năng hơn.
Hãy dùng vỏ chống nước (không đi kèm) khi sử dụng Osmo Action dưới nước.
Xem hướng dẫn và các kỹ thuật thú vị khác trong ứng dụng DJI Mimo

Quick Bắt đầu Guide teaches you how to get started with Osmo Action 3 and introduces DJI Mimo app. It is highly recommended to take approximately 1 to 3 minutes to go through the guide
Congratulations! Device activated. You can now enjoy full service and support
DJI Mimo offers precise control of shooting at short and medium distances, viewing in real-time, and assisting in image composition, making creative shooting effortlessly
Enjoy Live View in DJI Mimo
DJI Mimo supports downloading files directly, rather than exporting files from microSD card to mobile device
DJI Mimo provides video tutorials about how to use devices and capture scenes
DJI Mimo supports firmware update and helps unleash your creativity with new features
When enabled, photos and videos can be uploaded to cloud. Cloud editing, such as adding InvisiStick effects, will not be available after disabling
Recommended for uploading video to social media platforms
Enabling EIS Priority in Low Light will remove motion blur. Image sharpness may be affected when ambient light is too low
Device in timecode setting. Unable to use app
Quick Bắt đầu Guide teaches you how to get started with device and introduces DJI Mimo app. It is highly recommended to take approximately 1 to 3 minutes to go through the guide

"Press: Switch shooting modes. Mark highlights during video or slow motion video recording Press and hold: Power on or off"

Related data sources only provide sports data within certain period of time. DJI Mimo provides data storage services to ensure normal usage of dashboard. Rejecting authorization will restrict usage of related features, including data import and dashboard
After cancelling authorization and clearing data, related data stored on DJI Mimo server will be deleted, and usage of dashboard on related videos will be restricted. Continue?

Data channels such as Garmin Health only provide sports data within certain period of time. DJI Mimo provides data storage services to ensure normal usage of dashboard. Cancelling data authorization and clearing data will affect all sports data stored on server, and usage of dashboard on related videos will be restricted
Please enter the password on the device

Use Osmo Action 5 Pro to record video with sensor data, such as water depth, altitude, etc. and customize your video for sports tracking
Use Osmo Action 5 Pro to Record Video
Connect to bike with DJI Avinox drive system to record video with ride data during cycling, and then add relevant data to show your cycling skill
Connect to Bike With DJI Avinox Drive System to Record Video
Connect to Osmo Action GPS Bluetooth Remote Controller to record video with accurate sports data and add a host of data from dashboard to embellish your video
Connect to Remote Controller to Enable Dashboard
Current sticker not available. Relevant data missing
1. Authorize all related sports data. Otherwise, related sports data cannot be converted to dashboard format

2. If the full data authorization is not completed, it may result in the inability to use the dashboard function properly. Please try to cancel the existing data authorization in Data Import - More, Sports Data Cài đặt, and re-authorize Huawei Health.

3. If prompted that no matching data is obtained, please check that the Huawei Health service switch and the automatic data synchronization to the cloud switch are turned on in the Huawei Health APP - Me - Privacy Management
4. Sync will fail if authorization takes too long. Try to authorize again. Authorize again every 6 months

Due to the different recording frequencies in sports scenarios, some Huawei Health data undergo smoothing processing during use. This may cause a certain deviation between the dashboard data and the recorded data in Huawei Health, which is a normal phenomenon.
Imported file size cannot exceed 10 MB
Connect bike computer to computer. Select FIT file from bike computer, transfer and save sports data to Files on mobile device via WeChat, email, third-party cloud service, etc.
Connect bike computer to computer. Select FIT file from bike computer, transfer and save sports data to Files on mobile device via WeChat, email, third-party cloud service, etc.
Notes: Compatibility issues may occur due to different mobile device and bike computer models. Try different methods if connection fails
Select and import FIT file that is matched with video recording time

If exporting local FIT file is supported by bike computer app, data can be directly saved to Files on mobile device

Noise cancellation level switched. Press power button on mic until LED is solid yellow
When enabled, receiver and camera will be simultaneously powered on or off
After exiting Device Cài đặt, audio parameters can no longer be changed but recording is still available
Only available in Mono mode. Use post-production software and separate audio tracks later
When enabled, RX will automatically turn off after 15 minutes of inactivity when not connected to save power
When enabled, the TX will automatically power off to save power if it is not connected, internal recording is not enabled, and there has been no operation for 15 min
Restart DJI device and DJI Mimo and try again
1. Press and hold power buttons of transmitter and receiver to power on
2. Press and hold linking buttons of transmitter and receiver, until status LED of transmitter blinks blue and green alternatively, and transmitter status LED of receiver blinks green
3. Linking is successful when both LEDs of transmitter and receiver are solid green
Link DJI Mic Mini Transmitter and Receiver
2. Attach mobile device adapter to expansion port of receiver, and connect to mobile device. Lightning connector needs to be purchased separately if needed
3. Connection is successful when status LED of receiver is on
1. When receiver is powered off, disconnect adapter, press and hold power button of receiver for 6s until LED is solid blue
2. Make sure Bluetooth of mobile device is enabled. Open DJI Mimo and connect
3. After receiver is connected, app will directly jump to device cài đặt screen
Parameter Adjustments for DJI Mic Mini
1. Press and hold linking button of transmitter. Go to Cài đặt > Bluetooth on mobile device and connect to DJI Mic Mini transmitter
2. Open DJI Mimo and tap Connect once connection message pops up
3. After transmitter is connected, app will directly jump to device cài đặt screen
1. Make sure device is powered on
2. Make sure device is not connected to other mobile device
3. Check device LED, and make sure device is available for linking
1. Press and hold linking button of transmitter until LED blinks blue and green alternatively

Welcome to \"LightCut\" Product Improvement Project. By joining in the project, your hardware and mobile device information, and diagnostic and usage data will be provided to \"LightCut\" and help \"LightCut\" provide better products and services. You can open app and cancel project in \"Cài đặt\"

Welcome to LightCut Product Improvement Project. By joining in the project, your hardware and mobile device information, and diagnostic and usage data will be provided and help us provide better products and services. At the same time, your device information will still be available even if you have denied access to such information in your device system cài đặt. Please note that your device information will not be used for any purposes other than this project. You can open app and cancel project in Cài đặt. Read
We value your privacy and personal information. To better use the services and understand your rights, please read
By tapping Agree, you agree to the aforementioned agreement and accept all LightCut services
Note: LightCut app is for personal use only, and any content (including paid and free) or videos created using this app cannot be authorized to third-party for use or used for any commercial purposes
Read \"LightCut Privacy Policy\" for more information

Welcome to DJI Product Improvement Project. By participating in this project, you will share your data with DJI to help us improve our products and services. DJI values your privacy. Data collected through this project does not identify you personally. You may opt out of this project at any time in Cài đặt. Check our Privacy Policy for more information
DJI致力于不断提升产品体验，产品改进需要每个伙伴共同努力。您可以通过成为DJI合作伙伴，与DJI共享用户数据，来帮助DJI Mimo改进产品和服务。您的参与将为DJI伙伴们创造更多极致体验。
Data including product model, firmware version, device ID, status, and usage data will be analyzed and used to improve product experience
包括产品型号、固件版本号、设备标识号、反应设备状态和用量的日志，用于分析产品使用情况和状态以改进产品体验

超级伙伴共享的数据将帮助我们优化拍摄指导等智能服务体验
您将向Mimo提供DJI硬件设备信息、移动设备信息、用户行为日志和图像模块信息用于Mimo分析和改进产品。向下滑动查看详情。
Data including device SN, operating system version, and network information will be analyzed and used to improve app experience
包括移动设备标识号、系统版本、网络信息等相关信息，用于分析和改进APP服务体验
Data including account information, device properties, and usage data such as usage frequency will be analyzed and used to improve app user experience
包括设备属性数据、产品使用行为数据如功能使用频率等，以及账户信息，用于分析和改进APP服务体验

Data includes photos and videos shot by users and automatically shot when using ShotGuides, ActiveTrack, InvisiStick effects, and other features related to machine learning. Photos and videos will be desensitized and anonymized to protect your privacy and will only be used to optimize features such as gesture control and gimbal follow
包括使用拍摄指导、智能跟随、消除自拍杆等与机器学习有关的功能时，设备自动拍摄的及您主动拍摄的图片或视频，仅用于改进手势控制、云台跟随等功能。对数据进行分析或使用前，我们会首先对图像和视频进行脱敏和匿名化处理以保护您的隐私。

In this mode, the image will automatically zoom according to the speed of movement, allowing you to capture cinematic footage with dynamic zoom with simple camera movements.
Low light detected. Tap here to switch to Night Scene for better shooting results
Bright light detected. Recommended for use at night or in other dark scenes

Cinematic slow shutter elongates the motion trail of the subject. It is ideal for following a moving subject. It creates a cinematic effect where the subject is relatively clear while the ambient light and shadows flow. It is recommended to use at night or in low-light environments. Switch to Night Scene to use

Cinematic slow shutter elongates motion trail of the subject. It is ideal for following a moving subject. It creates a cinematic effect where the subject is relatively clear while the ambient light and shadows flow. It is recommended to use at night or in low-light environments

Camera will rotate automatically after recording starts. Simply hold the gimbal and walk forward or backward to create an Inception-like cinematic shot. It is suitable for shooting in scenes with a strong sense of depth or symmetrical structures

Gimbal will be adjusted to a mode suitable for dynamic movements. Select a person to follow, and you can easily capture stable, smooth footage. It is suitable for shooting running and other motion scenes
2.35:1 From the widescreen cinema system. It is designed for the big screen. It emphasizes horizontal space and cinematic narrative tension

You are welcome to participate in the DJI Product Improvement Program. Through this program, you will provide your DJI device information, mobile device information, and diagnostic and usage data to help DJI provide you with better products and services. If you have disabled access to DJI device information, participating in the program will still obtain your DJI device information, but your DJI device information will only be used in this program and will not be used elsewhere. You can cancel this plan at any time in the app cài đặt.

Swipe on blank space to adjust view. Tap green dot to switch tracking subject
When the camera Wi-Fi frequency band is 2.4 GHz, only low-resolution preview is supported in the app. To enable high-resolution preview, please switch the camera’s Wi-Fi frequency band.
Please add to favorites using the camera.
Please delete the entire looped video on the camera to avoid playback issues.
Unable to add camera movement. Min duration not met
Adjust to desired viewpoint, then select and apply camera movement
Tap and drag camera view to adjust perspective
Editing data already exists. Clip too short
Freeze-frame camera movement does not support cropping. Please skip or delete it before proceeding.
Unable to trim camera movement clip. Clip already at shortest duration
Unable to use Motion templates. Framing already selected here
Unable to add overlay effect. Camera movement clip already trimmed. Skip or delete camera movement before adding
"You've already completed tutorials. Edit your first video now"
Swipe or zoom to adjust perspective
Add keyframe to record current perspective
Swipe or zoom to adjust perspective
Tap screen to preview region keyframe effect
Rotate mobile device to adjust video perspective
Tap record button to capture desired clips
Permissions rejected or failed to be applied for due to system error. Please go to Cài đặt to authorize the permissions to use the functions normally.
Permissions rejected. Please authorize the permission to use the function normally.
Video duration too short. Failed to play.
"The device doesn't have camera.Can't be use the Inspire Cam."
Pano interrupted or stitching failed. Check the original file on a computer.
Are you sure you want to delete this footage and original video?
Place the QR code inside the box to scan successfully.

"Sending text message to the device already hit its limit, Please try again tomorrow"

Failed to add scene as it is too close to the previous scene.
Insufficient storage space for this timelapse video duration.
It takes at least 3 sec to save the original timelapse video. Interval adjusted to 3 sec.
Timelapse video time interval cannot be less than shutter speed. Interval adjusted to shutter time.
当前为渠道包，无法使用联调诊断工具
自定义域名未填写或者格式不对
Slink 模板 ID 缺少
此模式下不需要卸载 App，点击“激活”按钮可反复触发激活

"1. 开启 App 时拒绝“电话”授权； + 2. 手机系统权限设置中是否关闭“电话”授权； + 3. 请联系研发人员确认是否“调用 trackInstallation 接口在获取“电话”授权之后。
+ 排查修复后，请先卸载应用并重新安装，再扫码进行联调。"
检测到 “设备码为空”，可能原因如下，请排查：
当前网络不可用，请检查网络！
App 集成的项目与电脑浏览器打开的项目不同，无法使用联调诊断工具
无法重连，请检查是否更换了联调手机
数据接收地址错误，无法使用联调诊断工具
添加白名单请求失败，请联系技术支持人员排查问题!
未调用 setDeepLinkCompletion 方法设置回调函数
请使用 iOS 设备类型扫码
